title: Dashboard in Workspace Template App not working
excerpt: My app is a workspace template with the main view as a dasboard written as a custom app. The dashboard works in the original workspace, but when I try to install the template into another account it’s broken. I don’t thi…

posts.author: jakedluhy (Jake Dluhy)
posts.cookedHtml:
My app is a workspace template with the main view as a dasboard written as a custom app. The dashboard works in the original workspace, but when I try to install the template into another account it’s broken. I don’t think it’s an issue with my app, because it switches from the monday “loading” icon to the blank screen which would indicate my app is launching (or my app’s loading icon).

https://global.discourse-cdn.com/monday/original/2X/a/adc86e7b995a0fa687caf1d093d8ef31af5daf69.mov

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @jakedluhy - could you send us a screenshot of the ‘Publish’ tab of your application? We’ll take a closer look.

posts.author: jakedluhy (Jake Dluhy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sure! Here it is:

Screen Shot 2020-12-03 at 3.29.31 PM2432×1256 310 KB
Screen Shot 2020-12-03 at 3.29.38 PM2442×1258 245 KB

posts.author: jakedluhy (Jake Dluhy)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any update on this? Any information that you’ve discovered would be helpful.

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! Are you still facing this issue? Let me know and I’m happy to take a look.
